revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_IEP here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_IEP for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Cite encyclopedia
 |author-last={{{author-last1|{{{author1-last|{{{author-last|{{{last|{{{3|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}	
 |author-first={{{author-first1|{{{author1-first|{{{author-first|{{{first|}}}}}}}}}}}}	
 |author-link={{{author-link1|{{{author1-link|{{{author-link|}}}}}}}}}	
 |date={{{date|{{{4|}}}}}}

 |url={{#ifeq: {{#if: {{{url-id|}}}|{{{url-id}}}|{{{1|}}} }} | |
        |http://www.iep.utm.edu/{{{url-id|{{{1|}}}}}}
      }}
 |title={{{title|{{{2|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}
 |encyclopedia=[[Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy]]

 |author-last2={{{author-last2|{{{author2-last|{{{last2|}}}}}}}}}
 |author-first2={{{author-first2|{{{author2-first|{{{first2|}}}}}}}}}
 |author-link2={{{author-link2|{{{author2-link|}}}}}}
 |author-last3={{{author-last3|{{{author3-last|{{{last3|}}}}}}}}}
 |author-first3={{{author-first3|{{{author3-first|{{{first3|}}}}}}}}}
 |author-link3={{{author-link3|{{{author3-link|}}}}}}
 |author-last4={{{author-last4|{{{author4-last|{{{last4|}}}}}}}}}
 |author-first4={{{author-first4|{{{author4-first|{{{first4|}}}}}}}}}
 |author-link4={{{author-link4|{{{author4-link|}}}}}}
 
 |editor-first={{{editor-first|}}}
 |editor-last={{{editor-last|}}}
 |edition={{{edition|}}}
 |volume={{{volume|}}}
 |page={{{page|}}}
 |pages={{{pages|}}}
 |mode={{{mode|}}}
 |ref={{{ref|}}}
 |no-tracking={{{no-tracking|}}}
 |access-date={{{access-date|}}}
}}{{main other||}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Articles with Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy links]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
